content:
# Eolian Facies

**Summary**: Sedimentary structures and deposits formed by wind action.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] characterized eolian-face types including dunes, sand sheets, and interdunes.

- [[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022]] analyzed eolian-facies to understand reservoir heterogeneity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] Essential for understanding the sedimentary architecture of the Unayzah-A reservoir.

- [[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022]] analyzed eolian-facies to understand reservoir heterogeneity.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] identified via core description and image log interpretation.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified dune, sand sheet, and interdune as the primary recurring eolian depositional facies in Unayzah-A. ([[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011, p. 28]])


- The study identified distinct lithofacies such as grainflow, wind ripples, and mud-flat related features in the dune system. ([[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022, p. 80]])
